scope: Traffic information and collision-avoidance intentions for M3 corpus growth.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: collision / risk of collision / near miss
qa_notes.linguist_note: Keep the collision event separate from risk of collision.
Crossing is a traffic situation, not generic passing.
Overtaking should remain a traffic situation term.
Astern is direction behind; stern is a vessel part.
Ahead must not collapse into bow or forward.
Role must stay vessel-specific; action phrase alone is not enough.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: stand-on vessel / give-way vessel / stand by
qa_notes.linguist_note: Stand-on vessel is a COLREG role, not radio stand by.
CPA is distance/point; TCPA is time to CPA.

accepted_answers: time to closest point of approach

should_accept: time to closest point of approach
qa_notes.linguist_note: TCPA must remain collision-avoidance time, not ETA.
Action here is collision-avoidance action, not a VTS instruction.
Risk term must not become the collision event.
Draft keeps this as a traffic risk state, not a collision report.
Keep clear is the trained collision-avoidance term.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: alter course / change channel / alter speed
qa_notes.linguist_note: Change course is item-local; do not make change a broad alias.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: reduce speed / stop engine / increase speed
qa_notes.linguist_note: Reduce speed is not stop engine.
The object may be needed in phrase drills; short expression trains the action.
Pass ahead must stay opposite from pass astern.
Draft keeps word order strict pending linguist review.
Draft keeps word order strict pending linguist review.
Safe passing distance may be accepted item-locally.
Action timing should remain explicit.
Avoid accepting vague small/minor actions.
Safe pass is accepted as short expression only.
Keep bearing terminology exact.
Do not collapse bearing and heading.
CPA is distance/point, not time.

items.source_text: Малое TCPA / мало времени до CPA
accepted_answers: short time to closest point of approach

qa_notes.linguist_note: TCPA is time; keep it separate from CPA and ETA.

items.source_text: Я изменю курс вправо / на правый борт.
items.target_text: I will alter course to starboard.
accepted_answers: i will alter course to starboard
i am altering course to starboard

should_accept: I will alter course to starboard.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Starboard must not become ordinary right in this draft.

items.source_text: Я изменю курс влево / на левый борт.
items.target_text: I will alter course to port.
accepted_answers: i will alter course to port
i am altering course to port

should_accept: I will alter course to port.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Port as side must not collapse into harbour/port facility.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: reduce speed / stop engine / speed report
qa_notes.linguist_note: This reports action, not speed value.

items.source_text: Я пройду у вас за кормой.
items.target_text: I will pass astern of you.
accepted_answers: i will pass astern of you
i am passing astern of you
i will pass astern of your vessel

should_accept: I will pass astern of you.
dangerous_minimal_pairs: pass astern / pass ahead / missing object
qa_notes.linguist_note: Object should stay explicit in phrase item.

items.target_text: I will pass ahead of you.
accepted_answers: i will pass ahead of you
i am passing ahead of you
i will pass ahead of your vessel

should_accept: I will pass ahead of you.
dangerous_minimal_pairs: pass ahead / pass astern / missing object
qa_notes.linguist_note: Pass ahead is high-risk and should be reviewed.
Keep clear is preferred over ordinary paraphrase.

should_accept: you are the give way vessel
qa_notes.linguist_note: Role statement is sensitive and needs review.

items.source_text: Я являюсь судном, сохраняющим курс и скорость.

should_accept: i am the stand on vessel
dangerous_minimal_pairs: stand-on vessel / give-way vessel / stand by
qa_notes.linguist_note: Role statement is sensitive and needs review.

accepted_answers: there is a risk of collision

should_accept: there is a risk of collision
qa_notes.linguist_note: Keep risk state separate from event.

accepted_answers: my closest point of approach is one cable

qa_notes.linguist_note: Unit and CPA/TCPA distinction must stay strict.

accepted_answers: my time to closest point of approach is five minutes

qa_notes.linguist_note: Time and distance must not collapse.
Bearing must not become heading or course.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: bearing opening / bearing closing / constant bearing
qa_notes.linguist_note: Opening/closing bearing language needs linguist review.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: bearing closing / bearing opening / constant bearing
qa_notes.linguist_note: Closing bearing may indicate increasing collision risk; review wording.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: request intentions / request position / report intentions
qa_notes.linguist_note: Keep request/report distinction.
Report as instruction/request should be reviewed by linguist.

items.source_text: Намереваюсь пройти по вашему левому борту.
items.target_text: I intend to pass on your port side.
accepted_answers: i intend to pass on your port side
intend to pass on your port side
i will pass on your port side

should_accept: I intend to pass on your port side.
I will pass on your port side.
dangerous_minimal_pairs: port side / starboard side / harbour port
qa_notes.linguist_note: Side passing phrase is high-risk and needs review.

items.source_text: Намереваюсь пройти по вашему правому борту.
items.target_text: I intend to pass on your starboard side.
accepted_answers: i intend to pass on your starboard side
intend to pass on your starboard side
i will pass on your starboard side

should_accept: I intend to pass on your starboard side.
I will pass on your starboard side.
dangerous_minimal_pairs: starboard side / port side / ordinary right
qa_notes.linguist_note: Side passing phrase is high-risk and needs review.

items.source_text: Вы пересекаете мой курс с правого борта.
items.target_text: You are crossing from my starboard side.
accepted_answers: you are crossing from my starboard side
you cross from my starboard side

should_accept: You are crossing from my starboard side.
should_reject: you are crossing from my port side
dangerous_minimal_pairs: crossing from starboard / crossing from port / overtaking
qa_notes.linguist_note: Starboard-side crossing is a high-risk role cue.

items.source_text: Вы пересекаете мой курс с левого борта.
items.target_text: You are crossing from my port side.
accepted_answers: you are crossing from my port side
you cross from my port side

should_accept: You are crossing from my port side.
should_reject: you are crossing from my starboard side
dangerous_minimal_pairs: crossing from port / crossing from starboard / overtaking
qa_notes.linguist_note: Port-side crossing is a high-risk role cue.
Overtaking role must be reviewed.

should_reject: i will pass astern of you
i am passing ahead of you
qa_notes.linguist_note: Overtaking declaration must be reviewed.
Action timing should stay explicit.

examples: I will alter course to starboard.

grammar_patterns.pattern: I will pass + relation + of you
examples: I will pass astern of you.
I will pass ahead of you.

phrase_traffic_alter_starboard_001: I will alter course to starboard.
phrase_traffic_alter_port_001: I will alter course to port.
phrase_traffic_intend_pass_port_001: I intend to pass on your port side.
phrase_traffic_intend_pass_starboard_001: I intend to pass on your starboard side.
phrase_traffic_crossing_from_starboard_0: You are crossing from my starboard side.
phrase_traffic_crossing_from_port_001: You are crossing from my port side.

phrase_traffic_crossing_from_starboard_0: you are crossing from my port side
phrase_traffic_crossing_from_port_001: you are crossing from my starboard side

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Port/starboard side and alteration cues must not collapse into ordinary right/left or opposite side.

phrase_traffic_passing_astern_001: I will pass astern of you.
phrase_traffic_passing_ahead_001: I will pass ahead of you.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Ahead and astern reverse the planned passing relation.

phrase_traffic_passing_astern_001: I will pass astern of you.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Stern is a vessel part; astern is a relative position behind the vessel.

phrase_traffic_alter_starboard_001: I will alter course to starboard.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Course alteration must not become radio channel switching.
Speed reduction must not become stop-engine or speed-report wording.
Collision-risk language must stay separate from an actual collision event.
Closest point, time to closest point, ETA, and units must remain item-specific.
Give-way and stand-on roles carry opposite collision-avoidance duties.

phrase_traffic_crossing_from_starboard_0: You are crossing from my starboard side.
phrase_traffic_crossing_from_port_001: You are crossing from my port side.

phrase_traffic_crossing_from_starboard_0: you are crossing from my port side
phrase_traffic_crossing_from_port_001: you are crossing from my starboard side
phrase_traffic_i_am_overtaking_001: i will pass astern of you
i am passing ahead of you

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Traffic situation labels must not collapse across crossing, overtaking, and passing intentions.
Bearing observations must stay separate from heading and course wording.

producer_notes.status: merged into starter.json after QA acceptance
producer_notes.next_gate: Post-merge validation and QA acceptance before any production deploy
open_questions: Confirm whether pass ahead wording should be kept, narrowed, or replaced before playable merge.
Confirm CPA/TCPA wording and whether abbreviations should be accepted item-locally only.
Confirm stand-on/give-way role phrasing for yacht training context.
Confirm bearing opening/closing wording before regression expansion.
Confirm whether 'safe pass' is acceptable as a short expression variant.

decisions: Keep pass ahead/pass astern as trained traffic-intention phrases with strict opposite-side rejects.
Keep CPA/TCPA abbreviations and long forms item-local only.
Keep give-way vessel and stand-on vessel as advanced role language.
Keep bearing opening/closing/constant as advanced traffic-risk language with strict bearing/heading/course rejects.
Keep safe pass only as an item-local short-expression variant for safe passing.
